titleStmt.title: SII 26.617: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 617. (A.R. No. 586 of 1909.) MĀCHERLA, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the ruined ‘temple of heroes’ on the bank of the Chandravaṅka stream.

p.hi: Pratāparudra: Śaka 1236, Ānanda, Bhādrapada śu. 15, Sunday = 1314 A.D., August 25.

summary.p: It records the sarvamānya gift of 1/2 kaṁḍuka of wet land and dry land at Tēlaprōlu as Vīrapurusha-vṛitti by Dēvarināyani, son of Māchaya-nāyani, while he was administering Mahādēvicheru as a subordinate of the king who is described as immaḍi-niśśaṁka-vīra, kaliṁga-vīrabhadra, javanika-trinētra and Kākatirājya-samuddharaṇa, etc. It also registers a gift of one vessel of oil from out of the income of 22 ka of oil-mill, by the same donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṁḍalēśvara kākatiyya pratāparudradē
va mahārājulu sukhamugā
vinōdaṁbuna pṛthivī rājyamu sē
yucuṁḍaṁgānu tī pā
dōpajīvulaina svāmi drōharagaṁ
ḍa Iṁmaḍi niśśaṁkavīra kaliṁga
vīrabhadra javanika trinētra kākatirā
jya samuddharaṇulaina svastiśrīmatu
mācayanāyaniṁgāri koḍku
lu dēvarināyaniṁgāru mahā
dēvi ceṟuvu sukhānaṁ bāliṁpucū
nu tamaku puṇyamugānu svasti
śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1236 Āgu
nēṁṭi Ānaṁda saṁvatsara bhādra
pada śu 15 Ā . tēḷaprōla kaṁḍu
guḍi tū na māramuna nīru
nēla pādi kaṁḍuka . cēnu vīra pu
ru ṣulaku vrittigānu dhārapōsi
viṁda tapphu kaṟi kollu paddēlā (?)
yamu sarvvamānyamugā
nu Istimi . svadattāṁ paradattā
ṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā
ṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvaṣa . sahasrāṇi vi
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ labaṁ
di mānaku 22 ka gānugaṁ biṁḍu (?)
la tayamu nūne Istimi .
Īdharmmamu Evvaru dappinānu vāru
gaṁgakaṟuta gaṁgakavilaṁ boḍici
na pāpānaṁ baḍuvāru .
Digital edition of SII 26.617 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
